title: First-Line Supervisors of Security Workers
description: Directly supervise and coordinate activities of security workers and security guards.

tasks.text: Investigate disturbances on the premises, such as security alarms, altercations, and suspicious activity.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Patrol the premises to prevent or detect intrusion, protect property, or preserve order.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor and authorize entry of employees, visitors, or other persons.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Secure entrances and exits by locking doors and gates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write reports documenting observations made while on patrol.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor the behavior of security employees to ensure adherence to quality standards, deadlines, or procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Advise employees in handling problems or resolving complaints from customers, tenants, detainees, or other persons.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recruit, interview, and hire security personnel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assign security personnel to posts or patrols.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Call police or fire departments in cases of emergency, such as fire, bomb threats, and presence of unauthorized persons.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Apprehend or evict trespassers, rule violators, or other security threats from the premises.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Screen individuals and belongings to prevent passage of prohibited materials using walkthrough detectors, wands, or bag searches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor closed-circuit television cameras.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect and adjust security equipment to ensure it is operational or to detect evidence of tampering.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Train security personnel on protective procedures, first aid, fire safety, and other duties.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Explain company policies and procedures to staff using oral or written communication.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop and document security procedures, policies, or standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Schedule training or drills for emergencies, such as fires, bombs, and other threats.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Log items distributed to persons, such as keys and key cards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write and present department budgets to upper management or other stakeholders.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Order materials or supplies, such as keys, uniforms, and badges.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
